description_long: This is a large, rustic log cabin set on a slightly sloped grassy plot with a paved driveway and walkways. The structure features a prominent gabled roof with multiple intersecting sections, all covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden logs, giving the cabin a traditional and sturdy appearance. Several windows of varying sizes are distributed across the facades, with some grouped symmetrically and others placed individually. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch with steps leading up to it, while the rear and sides show additional doors and windows. The overall setting suggests a comfortable, spacious residence suitable for a suburban or semi-rural neighborhood.
description: A large, rustic log cabin with a dark gabled roof, multiple windows, and a covered front porch, set on a grassy plot with paved paths.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from an angle showing the main facade, covered front porch, and the driveway curving toward the entrance.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front porch and main entrance, with the gabled roof and steps leading up to the door clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the cabin are visible, showing additional windows and the extended log structure along the back.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective reveals the roof's complex gabled structure and the layout of the surrounding grassy plot and paths.
attribute_roof_type: complex gable roof with multiple intersecting gables and moderate overhangs, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows of varying sizes are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually along the sides.
attribute_door_placement: A main exterior door is centered on the front facade beneath the porch, with at least one additional door visible on the rear or side.
